heading: Deputy Director
label: 3506 Deputy Director
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1979 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1979section 512(a) of Pub. L. 96–53section 2151 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1979 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1979section 512(a) of Pub. L. 96–53section 2151 of this title

children.heading: Appointment; compensation
children.label: a Appointment; compensation
children.text: A Deputy Director of the Institute shall be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate. The Deputy Director shall receive compensation at the rate payable for level IV of the Executive Schedule under .section 5315 of title 5

children.heading: Duties and powers
children.label: b Duties and powers
children.text: The Deputy Director shall perform such duties and exercise such powers as the Director may prescribe.

children.heading: Additional positions; establishment by President; compensation
children.label: c Additional positions; establishment by President; compensation
children.text: The President may establish up to two additional positions in the Institute to be compensated at the rate payable for level V of the Executive Schedule under .section 5316 of title 5
